name: Chocolate Cheesecake Bars
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces milk chocolate chips (or semi-sweet chocolate chips)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Mix melted butter with graham cracker crumbs and nuts in a bowl until combined.
3. Press mixture into an ungreased springform pan, packing it down firmly.
4. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and allow to cool completely before unmolding.
6. Cool fully before cutting into bars.
